extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: I counted only the “Against our Company” and “Against our Subsidiaries” rows, excluding all “By” rows and excluding the Corporate Promoter and Directors from the issuer-group aggregate. Criminal proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries total 0, statutory/regulatory actions total 3 against the Company and 0 against Subsidiaries, and tax proceedings total 0; the quantified amount against the group is ₹480.00 million for the Company plus Nil for Subsidiaries, or ₹48.00 crore after conversion at ₹10 million per crore. No contingent-liabilities table or going-concern uncertainty is disclosed in the provided risk section. The company-wide top-five concentration is 87.79% of revenue from operations for Fiscal 2024; no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed (the 97.63% figure is for the top nine offtakers). Monetary litigation tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10; no separate source unit is stated for contingent liabilities because that figure is not disclosed.
